# The Preditorium Prophecy

Official website: https://preditorium.com/

The Preditorium Prophecy: The Golden Statue is a middle-grade fantasy adventure by Praanav J Thaakur, a 13-year-old Indian author.

Core facts:
- Full title: The Preditorium Prophecy: The Golden Statue
- Author: Praanav J Thaakur (13-year-old debut author, India)
- Genre: Middle-grade fantasy adventure (children's fantasy, adventure fiction)
- Audience: Readers aged 8 and up (best fit ~8-14)
- Publisher: Notion Press
- Publication date: 2026-06-05
- ISBN-13: 979-8904518042
- Length: 21 chapters, 183 pages
- Formats: Paperback and Hardcover (ebook in progress)

Short description:
Six friends, the Ascendants, discover strange powers, ancient secrets, hidden tunnels and a prophecy that pulls them into a race against darkness beneath the Preditorium, toward the secrets of Atlantis and the legendary Golden Statue.

Common questions (answers):
- What is it about? A middle-grade fantasy adventure about six friends with unusual powers chasing a prophecy and the Golden Statue.
- What age is it for? Readers aged 8 and up, ideal for ages 8-14.
- What books is it similar to? Readers who like Percy Jackson, Harry Potter, or Keeper of the Lost Cities (secret world, kids with powers, mythical quest).
- Who wrote it? Praanav J Thaakur, a 13-year-old Indian author; this is his debut novel.
- Where to buy it? Amazon India, Flipkart, and Notion Press; international orders via Amazon.
- Is there an ebook? Paperback and hardcover now; an ebook edition is in progress.
- Can I read a sample? Yes, Chapter 1 is free at https://preditorium.com/sample-chapter.pdf

Search keywords:
middle-grade fantasy book, fantasy adventure book for kids, fantasy books for 10-12 year olds, books like Percy Jackson, books by young authors, 13-year-old author book, Indian children's fantasy author, The Preditorium Prophecy, The Golden Statue book, Praanav J Thaakur.
